name: bmi-gauge
title: BMI Gauge
description: Height + weight in, BMI out, on a six-segment WHO spectrum from underweight to obese III.

props.name: bmi
props.description: Explicit BMI; bypasses derivation. Mutually exclusive with height/weight.

props.name: height
props.description: Height (cm for metric, inches for imperial). Required with weight when bmi is omitted.

props.name: weight
props.description: Weight (kg for metric, lb for imperial).

props.name: showCategoryLabel
props.description: Show the category label + spectrum gauge column.

clinicalNotes: BMI categories are population screening bands, not diagnoses: the number and the band are shown together, never the band alone. Auto-classification follows WHO adult cutoffs (kg/m²): underweight <18.5, healthy 18.5–24.9, overweight 25–29.9, obese I 30–34.9, obese II 35–39.9, obese III ≥40. BMI misclassifies muscular builds and does not apply to under-18s (use age/sex percentiles) or pregnancy — pass `category` to override in those cases. Both underweight and the obese bands are abnormal, so the spectrum lights only the active band (positional, not an ordinal severity ramp). The value is exposed to screen readers as text, so the band is never conveyed by color alone. Non-positive height/weight render a neutral "BMI unavailable" state rather than a bogus number.
notes: medcn-original sibling of blood-pressure-badge; six WHO bands, low-and-high abnormal so no cumulative fill.
